checks.description: All call-to-action buttons should be visible and labeled
checks.detail: All screens have clearly labeled CTA buttons: 'Continue', 'Start Learning!', 'Next', 'Complete Diagnostic', 'Start Your First Lesson!', 'Start Lesson', 'Submit', 'Back to Home'. Buttons use the shared Button component with title prop.

checks.description: Loading states should show a meaningful indicator and message
checks.detail: LoadingScreen component shows ActivityIndicator with contextual message: 'Starting diagnostic...', 'Setting up your lesson...', 'Loading results...', 'Preparing your dashboard...'. Known limitation: no timeout fallback.

checks.description: Error states should show clear message and retry action
checks.detail: ErrorScreen component shows error message and Retry button. Error states present in diagnostic (init session, submit response), lesson (create session, submit text), processing, and result screens.

checks.description: When backend is unavailable, app should show understandable error
checks.detail: When backend is unreachable, API calls throw and ErrorScreen renders with the error message and retry button. Known limitation: offline state not visually distinct from initial loading.

checks.description: Text input should remain visible when keyboard opens
checks.detail: All screens use KeyboardAvoidingView with appropriate behavior ('padding' for iOS, 'height' for Android). ScrollView with keyboardShouldPersistTaps='handled' ensures tap targets remain accessible.

checks.description: App should render acceptably at small phone viewport
checks.detail: All screens use ScrollView for vertical scrolling. Layout uses padding/flex, no hardcoded widths. CTA buttons remain visible in footer.

checks.description: App should render at regular phone viewport
checks.detail: Content fits within viewport with scrolling. Step indicators, grids, and cards render correctly.

checks.description: App should render at tablet-like viewport
checks.detail: Layout stretches to fill wider viewport. Option grids and chip rows use flexWrap for multi-row layout.

checks.description: Text should be readable at 200% browser zoom without layout break
checks.detail: Font sizes are specified in pt/pixel units. ScrollView handles overflow. No fixed-height containers that clip text.

checks.check: Validation failure does not look like success
checks.description: Failed validation should be clearly distinguishable from success
checks.detail: Complete lesson shows green (#E8F5E9) background with checkmark icon. Incomplete/warning uses orange (#FFF3E0) with warning icon. Warning box explicitly says '⚠️ Lesson not marked as completed'.

checks.check: Result screen does not show fake completion
checks.description: Result screen should show actual status, not assumed PASS
checks.detail: Result screen checks session.status and status param. Shows completion only if COMPLETED. Otherwise shows 'Lesson In Progress' with actual status value. Warning box explains completion gate.

checks.description: Submit button should be disabled for text < 10 characters
checks.detail: Lesson screen checks currentText.trim().length >= 10 before enabling Submit. Shows 'Minimum 10 characters (N/10)' warning in orange.

checks.description: Same idempotency key returns same result without error
checks.detail: X-Idempotency-Key header accepted by backend. Duplicate submission returns previous result. Integration test confirms safe idempotency.

checks.description: User cannot bypass diagnostic or contract
checks.detail: Onboarding redirects to /diagnostic after profile creation. Diagnostic redirects to /learning-contract after completion. Contract redirects to /home. No direct route access to lesson without completing prerequisite steps.
